system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_pallet_card_print4","body":"	
CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_PALLET_CARD_PRINT4](@cardNo nvarchar(MAX))
AS
BEGIN
	--DECLARE @cardNo nvarchar(MAX) = 'PCM25010808012381301, PCM25010808012343701, PCM25010808012306301';
	DECLARE @PALLET_CARD TABLE
	(
		card_no nvarchar(200)
	)

	INSERT INTO @PALLET_CARD(card_no)
	SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@cardNo, ',')

	DECLARE @madonhang nvarchar(200);
	SELECT @madonhang = A.dondathang 
	FROM tr_pallet A INNER JOIN tr_pallet_card B ON A.id = B.pallet_id
	WHERE B.card_no IN (SELECT card_no FROM @PALLET_CARD)

	DECLARE @fsc_id int;
	SELECT TOP (1) @fsc_id = fsc_id
	FROM dqt_thongke_phoi WITH(NOLOCK)
	WHERE madonhang = @madonhang
	ORDER BY ngaytao DESC

	DECLARE @malo_nguyenlieu nvarchar(max);
	SELECT @malo_nguyenlieu = COALESCE(@malo_nguyenlieu + ', ', '') + malo_nguyenlieu
	FROM dqt_thongke_phoi WITH(NOLOCK)
	WHERE madonhang = @madonhang
	GROUP BY malo_nguyenlieu
	
	IF @fsc_id IS NULL
		SET @fsc_id = 1


	SELECT A.id, A.dondathang, A.masp, sp.tensp, sp.tensp_vn, sp.hehang, sp.mausac, sp.customer, 
		hinhanh = replace(sp.hinhanh, 'wwwroot', ''),
		A.mahtr, 
		cumchitiet = dbo.GetNameBySTT(A.masp, LEFT(B.stt_snap, 1)),
		--A.stt, A.mact, A.tenct, A.nguyenlieu,
		--A.dayy_tc, 
		--A.rong_tc, 
		--A.dai_tc, 
		--A.soluong_tc,
		--A.dayy_sc, 
		--A.rong_sc, 
		--A.dai_sc, 
		--A.soluong_sc,
		stt = B.stt_snap, 
		mact = B.mact_snap, 
		tenct = B.tenct_snap, 
		nguyenlieu = B.nguyenlieu_snap,
		dayy_tc = B.dayy_tc_snap, 
		rong_tc = B.rong_tc_snap, 
		dai_tc = B.dai_tc_snap, 
		soluong_tc = B.soluong_tc_snap,
		dayy_sc = B.dayy_sc_snap, 
		rong_sc = B.rong_sc_snap, 
		dai_sc = B.dai_sc_snap, 
		soluong_sc = B.soluong_sc_snap,
		quycach_tinhche = CASE WHEN B.dayy_tc_snap > 0 AND B.rong_tc_snap > 0 AND B.dai_tc_snap > 0 THEN CONCAT(FORMAT(B.dayy_tc_snap, '#,0.##'), ' * ', FORMAT(B.rong_tc_snap, '#,0.##'), ' * ', FORMAT(B.dai_tc_snap, '#,0.##')) END,
		quycach_soche = CASE WHEN B.dayy_sc_snap > 0 AND B.rong_sc_snap > 0 AND B.dai_sc_snap > 0 THEN CONCAT(FORMAT(B.dayy_sc_snap, '#,0.##'), ' * ', FORMAT(B.rong_sc_snap, '#,0.##'), ' * ', FORMAT(B.dai_sc_snap, '#,0.##')) END,
		A.dayy_phoi,
		ISNULL(B.ghichu_snap, ' ') AS ghichu, 
		--A.veneer_canhdai, 
		--A.veneer_canhngan,
		veneer_canhdai = B.veneer_canhdai_snap, 
		veneer_canhngan = B.veneer_canhngan_snap,
		C.loaihang AS veneer_matchinh, 
		D.loaihang AS veneer_matphu,
		E.loaihang AS veneer_dan_canh,
		A.donhang,

		veneer_matchinh1 = CASE WHEN C.loaihang IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(N'Mặt chính: ', C.loaihang) END,
		veneer_matphu1 = CASE WHEN D.loaihang IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(N'Mặt phụ: ', D.loaihang) END,
		veneer_dan_canh1 = CASE WHEN E.loaihang IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(N'Dánh cạnh: ', E.loaihang) END,
	
		A.bemat, A.somat_giacong,
		A.cc_canh1, A.cc_canh2, A.cc_dau1, A.cc_dau2, A.cc_mat1, A.cc_mat2,
		B.card_no, B.card_type, B.soluong,
		soluong_donhang = CASE WHEN A.hangbu = 1 THEN 0 ELSE IIF(B.soluong_tc_snap <= 0, 0, B.soluong / B.soluong_tc_snap) END,
		tieude = CASE WHEN A.hangbu = 1 THEN N'PHIẾU PALLET (Hàng bù)' ELSE N'PHIẾU PALLET' END,
		COALESCE(B.reissue_date, B.issue_date) AS issue_date
	INTO #PALLET_CARD
	FROM tr_pallet A
		INNER JOIN tr_pallet_card B ON A.id = B.pallet_id
		INNER JOIN tr_sanpham sp ON A.masp = sp.masp
		LEFT JOIN tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer C ON B.veneer_matchinh_snap = C.id
		LEFT JOIN tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer D ON B.veneer_matphu_snap = D.id
		LEFT JOIN tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer E ON B.veneer_dan_canh_snap = E.id
	WHERE B.card_no IN (SELECT card_no FROM @PALLET_CARD);

	SELECT A.*, 
		--ghichu2 = N'Dán veneer ' + CONCAT_WS(' + ', A.veneer_matchinh1, A.veneer_matphu1, A.veneer_dan_canh1),
		ghichu2 = CASE WHEN LEN(CONCAT_WS(' + ', A.veneer_matchinh1, A.veneer_matphu1, A.veneer_dan_canh1)) > 0 
			THEN N'Dán veneer ' + CONCAT_WS(' + ', A.veneer_matchinh1, A.veneer_matphu1, A.veneer_dan_canh1)
			ELSE ''
		END,
		fsc_100 = CASE WHEN @fsc_id = 2 THEN CONVERT(bit, 1) ELSE CONVERT(bit, 0) END, 
		fsc_cw = CASE WHEN @fsc_id = 3 THEN CONVERT(bit, 1) ELSE CONVERT(bit, 0) END, 
		fsc_mix = CASE WHEN @fsc_id = 3 THEN CONVERT(bit, 1) ELSE CONVERT(bit, 0) END, 
		fsc_recycled = CASE WHEN @fsc_id = 4 THEN CONVERT(bit, 1) ELSE CONVERT(bit, 0) END,
		malo_nguyenlieu = ISNULL(@malo_nguyenlieu, ' ')
		--fsc_mix = CASE WHEN B.fsc_cw = 1 OR B.fsc_mix = 1 THEN CONVERT(bit, 1) ELSE CONVERT(bit, 0) END,
		--non_fsc = CASE WHEN B.fsc_100 = 0 AND B.fsc_cw = 0 AND B.fsc_mix = 0 THEN CONVERT(bit, 1) ELSE CONVERT(bit, 0) END
	FROM #PALLET_CARD A
		LEFT JOIN tr_order_detail B ON A.donhang = B.order_number AND A.masp = B.item_number
	ORDER BY A.nguyenlieu;
    
    SELECT A.*, OP.yeucau_chatluong, OP.yeucau_kythuat, E.tenmay, B.n_op, OP.n_op AS n_op2, C.tenkhuvuc, P.card_no
    FROM #PALLET_CARD P
		LEFT JOIN tr_quytrinh_sanpham2 A ON P.masp = A.masp AND P.mact = A.mact
    	LEFT JOIN trtb_m_op B ON A.quytrinh = B.c_op
    	LEFT JOIN tr_khuvuc_sanxuat C ON B.department = C.makhuvuc
		LEFT JOIN trtb_m_op OP ON A.quytrinh2 = OP.c_op
		LEFT JOIN mes_danhsach_maymoc E ON A.id_maymoc = E.id
    WHERE A.active = 1
    	AND ISNULL(A.quytrinh, '') <> ''
    ORDER BY A.nguyenlieu, P.card_no, A.buoc;

	DROP TABLE #PALLET_CARD;
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_danhsach_maymoc","dbo.string_split","dbo.tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer","dbo.tr_khuvuc_sanxuat","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_pallet","dbo.tr_pallet_card","dbo.tr_quytrinh_sanpham2","dbo.tr_sanpham","dbo.trtb_m_op"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
